purpose: Define approved source categories and validation requirements for future Panchang and Festival features without enabling live calculation or API fetch.

approved_source_categories.label: Recognized Panchang reference
approved_source_categories.use_case: Manual validation of tithi, nakshatra, sunrise/sunset, festival and observance metadata.

approved_source_categories.label: Reviewed Panchang calculation library
approved_source_categories.use_case: Future technical calculation after comparison with recognized Panchang references.

approved_source_categories.label: Manual editorial verification
approved_source_categories.use_case: Final review before public dynamic output.

approved_source_categories.label: Official or recognized festival calendar reference
approved_source_categories.use_case: Festival and observance cross-checking before display.

blocked_source_categories: runtime DOM generation of Panchang values
client-side external API fetch without review
single-source festival date assertion without cross-check
guardrails: Do not enable public dynamic Panchang output.
Do not fetch external Panchang APIs in this stage.
Do not calculate live tithi, nakshatra, sunrise, sunset, yoga, karana or festival dates in this stage.
Do not present unreviewed observances as authoritative.
